header: Capabilities that scale with your team
subheadline: Swipe through the building blocks teams rely on every day.

items.title: Live analytics
items.description: Track the metrics that matter and spot trends the moment they emerge.

items.title: Team workspaces
items.description: Give every department a shared home for its dashboards and reports.

items.title: Enterprise security

items.title: Instant automations
items.description: Trigger alerts and workflows automatically when a metric crosses a line.

items.title: Global edge delivery
